heading: Implementation powers and limitations
label: 17904 Implementation powers and limitations
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1790440:795c., , .Pub. L. 96–571, § 594 Stat. 3342Dec. 22, 1980In subsection (a), the words “federal agency” are substituted for “department, agency, or instrumentality of the United States Government” because of the definition of “federal agency” in .section 17901 of this titleIn subsection (d), the words “notwithstanding any other provision of law” are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Accommodation of Needs for Electric Energy
children.label: a .—Accommodation of Needs for Electric Energy
children.text: This chapter does not require or authorize a federal agency to construct a new electric generating facility or related facility, to modify an existing facility, or to employ reserve or standby equipment to accommodate the needs of a non-federal person for electric energy.

children.heading: .—Availability of Revenue From Sales
children.label: b .—Availability of Revenue From Sales
children.text: Revenue received by a federal agency pursuant to from the sale of electric energy generated from a facility of that agency is available to the agency without fiscal year limitation to purchase fuel and for operation, maintenance, and other costs associated with that facility.section 17902 of this title
responsibilities of the head of the federal agency under other law.

children.heading: .—Negotiation and Execution of Contracts and Other Agreements
children.label: d .—Negotiation and Execution of Contracts and Other Agreements
children.text: A contract or other agreement executed under this chapter shall be negotiated and executed by the head of the federal agency selling or purchasing electric energy under this chapter.
